Evolution Stables - Digital Racehorse Ownership & Tokenized RWA Platform

Grounded in tradition.
Evolved through innovation.
Ownership transformed.

ABOUT

Own the Experience

Racehorse ownership has changed. Evolution Stables removes the barriers that once made it complex and inaccessible — opening the door for first-timers and seasoned fans alike to not just watch, but own the experience.

Unlock the thrill of ownership with early access and behind-the-scenes coverage - it is easier than you think.

OUR MISSION

How It Works

At Evolution Stables, we understand that ownership is the lifeblood of racing — and strengthening it benefits every part of the industry.

Investors
Fans

Experience the thrill — without the hassle.

Ownership, on your terms. Simplified terms and conditions give you the full thrill of ownership in a transparent, regulated marketplace — where risk and return are clear before you buy.

Breeders
Syndicators

Unlock new income — same control, zero extra effort.

Expand your reach and retain full control, with offers structured, managed, and delivered — all in one place.

Clubs
Organisations

From spectators to invested stakeholders.

Ownership is the gateway to deeper engagement — turning one-time spectators into lifelong members, building revenue, and strengthening the sport's future, all in one place.

OUR MODEL

Digital Syndication

Syndication has always been the heartbeat of racehorse ownership — sharing risk, reward, and the thrill of the sport. But the way people participate has changed.

Our digital-syndication model builds on that legacy — lowering barriers, increasing transparency, and unlocking new ways for owners, investors, and fans to participate — without replacing what works.

Increased Access

A digital platform that lowers barriers and opens ownership to everyone.

Greater Transparency

Real-time performance, clear costs, and open communication.

Borderless Flexibility

Fractional shares and short-term commitments for modern investors.

REGULATED MARKETPLACE

Transformation Powered by Tokinvest

Behind our integrated marketplace, Tokinvest delivers the raw horsepower that powers digital-syndication — built on regulated, financial-grade infrastructure, tailored from institutional finance and adapted to meet the demands of modern owners.

Discover Opportunities

Explore available syndications and short-term leases — all clearly structured, fully transparent, and ready to invest in with confidence.

Trade with Confidence

Tokinvest's regulated platform ensures secure transactions, immutable ownership records, and integrated settlements — so every trade is safe, clear, and straightforward.

Real-Time Insight

Follow your horses, track performance, and manage your positions in real time — with ownership data, updates, and key information always at your fingertips.

Learn More About Tokinvest

NEWS AND UPDATES

17-04-2026
Evolution Stables
Read the full story here→

Prudentia Wins at Te Rapa in Gutsy Heavy Track Performance

Great news for Evolution Stables investors — Prudentia has scored a tough, gutsy victory in Race 7 (BM65, 1300m) at Te Rapa this afternoon on a Heavy 10 track. She showed her class, coming from deep in the field at the halfway mark, running the perfect race to take the lead where it counted and fighting hard all the way to the line under Masa Hashizume. Prudentia won by 0.33L from Fleeting Star (0.33L back), with Amusement 0.73L third. To put that into context, that's approximately 0.8 metres!

28-10-2024
BusinessDesk

Bringing Racing into the Digital Age

New Zealand racing industry embraces digital transformation with Evolution Stables leading the charge.

15-11-2024
Trackside

Thoroughbred Ownership Reimagined

How Evolution Stables is transforming traditional racehorse syndication through digital innovation and blockchain technology.

19-12-2024
Investing.com

Tokinvest and Singularry Superapp Partner to Make Regulated Real-World Asset Investing Accessible to Everyone

Strategic partnership bringing regulated real-world asset investing to mainstream audiences through innovative digital platforms.

20-01-2026
TOKINVEST

Dubai Racing Club and Tokinvest Announce Partnership

Digital syndication is transforming racehorse ownership globally, and Evolution Stables stands at the forefront of this revolution. The partnership between Dubai Racing Club and Tokinvest validates what we've been building in New Zealand—a regulated, accessible model for fractional horse ownership. While Dubai targets elite international campaigns with premium investor tiers, Evolution Stables democratizes the experience for local racing enthusiasts. This landmark partnership proves digital syndication isn't just the future—it's happening now, and Evolution is leading the charge locally.

03-10-2025
Gulf Business

Tokinvest secures VARA's first multi-asset issuance licence, raises $3.2m

Tokinvest's $3.2m pre-seed round was backed by VCs, family offices and high-net-worth investors, including Triliv Holdings and Exponential Science.

FinTech Global

Tokinvest Raises $3.2m Pre-Seed for RWA Platform

Founded to democratise access to premium assets, Tokinvest provides a platform for fractional ownership across diverse asset classes.

04-04-2025
Tokinvest

Tokinvest Appointed by Evolution Stables to Launch Tokenised Racehorse Leases

Tokinvest, the VARA-regulated marketplace transforming real-world asset (RWA) investing, has been appointed by Evolution Stables.
